name: Angel Food Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 9x13 pan.
2. Whip the cream until it forms soft peaks.
3. Add everything except the cake to the whipped cream.
4. Break up half the cake into small pieces and spread over the bottom of the pan.
5. Pour half the cream mixture on top of the cake pieces.
6. Repeat with the remaining cake and cream mixture.
7. Refrigerate for 6 hours before serving.
8. Topping may be added, such as tinted coconut, to suit the occasion.
